embeds.title: Check Glyphs & Alphabets presence!
embeds.description:
G&A is not only on Discord, we're a community that stretches out many platforms. We create and post content that we think you type & letter-loving people would enjoy!
Please consider following us on the accounts below!

fields.name: G&A Tumblr blog
fields.value:
Full of shitposts, screenshots from this server, & more G&A content
https://glyphs-fi.tumblr.com/

fields.name: Daily Ligatures Twitter
fields.value:
A G&A page that barfs out ligatures (semi-)daily!
https://twitter.com/glyphs_fi/

fields.name: r/Typography
fields.value:
G&A's officially partnered subreddit where you'll find other typography content!
https://reddit.com/r/typography/
